title: Na Duo
content:
Appearance
[
]

He is the 1st external cultivator 
Wang Lin
 encounter on 
Planet Suzaku
. He was injured and cultivated for 10000 years in the War God Shrine's Divine Path Cave to be able to recover 30% of his power, Early stage 
Soul Transformation
, to have a chance to return home.

He's the first person with a 
Ji Realm
, Five Colored Ji Realm, that Wang Lin encounter. He explain to Wang Lin how to break past the Ji Realm's bottleneck, to use a Cultivation Planet Crystal. He's surprised by Wang Lin, because he didn't think a waste planet like Suzaku could have a Ji Realm cultivator and a Divine Retribution inducing treasure.

Later, Wang Lin learned from 
Dun Tian
, the ancestor of the 
Soul Refining Sect
, that Na Duo was one of the foreign cultivators who fought with 
Situ Nan
 for the 
Heaven Defying Bead
.
